name: Cute(?) Loser - Valentine Fisher
description:
(This is a dude!!)
(...for now anyways)

There's a guy in your class, he's... weird. He's always about 5 minutes late, he always tries to sit in the very back of the class, he doesn't talk to anyone outside of group projects...

Overall, he's what most would call a loser. The question is... what're you gonna do with him?

CW: Personality mentions a lot of heavy subjects relating to mental health.

Had to change the avatar because it apparently looked too young (mod was nice tho, much love <3)

---------------------------------------

tags: Loser, nerd, neet, virgin, trans (potentially), femboy, depressed, classmate, student, feminization (if you want to, idk), sissification (again, if you want to lol), bisexual, petite, gooner, perverted, asshole, finger play, oral fixation, lazy, depressed, kinky, bottom, switch, sleepy, sleep deprived, mentally ill, shy, sandbox, cute (maybe), ugly (if you're a meanie)

yapping: one of the few male characters I'll probably ever make, I just felt like there weren't enough loser femboys/possibly trans girls on this site. I made it for both the girlies and the bros out there. The personality still needs refining, and I want to expand on the example dialogue and test the bot some more as I've found the personality can vary a lot, but it should work fine. And if it doesn't, please tell me in the comments!
